red_lines: Threats to Communist Party monopoly on power
Loss of territorial gains from Molotov-Ribbentrop Pact
Western Allies making separate peace with Germany
Any challenge to personal authority within the Soviet system
core_narratives: Great Patriotic War for the survival of the Motherland
Socialist system proving superior to fascism
Demand for Western Allies to open a second front

decision_history.event_description: Germany invaded the Soviet Union with overwhelming force along entire western border
decision_history.decision_taken: After initial paralysis, assumed personal command as Supreme Commander; ordered no retreat policy
decision_history.outcome: Catastrophic initial losses of 4+ million troops but stabilized front before Moscow in December 1941
context_factors: purge of officer corps left army leaderless
industrial evacuation eastward saved war production

decision_history.event_description: German advance toward Stalingrad and Caucasus oil fields in summer 1942
decision_history.decision_taken: Issued Order No. 227 (Not One Step Back); committed massive reserves to defend Stalingrad while planning encirclement
decision_history.outcome: Soviet Operation Uranus encircled German 6th Army; decisive turning point of the war
context_factors: Caucasus oil critical to German war machine
growing confidence in Zhukov's operational planning
penal battalions for motivation through terror

decision_history.event_description: Need to coordinate grand strategy with Western Allies
decision_history.decision_taken: Attended Tehran Conference; pressed relentlessly for cross-Channel invasion date commitment
decision_history.outcome: Secured firm commitment for Operation Overlord in May 1944; began shaping post-war spheres of influence
context_factors: Soviet Union bearing vast majority of ground war casualties

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Communist Party apparatus, NKVD security services, Red Army command (post-purge loyalists), state propaganda system
historical_analogies: Industrialization as path to military power

ongoing_operations: Eastern Front total war vs Germany
military_posture.force_disposition: total national mobilization; 11+ million under arms by 1943; strategic reserves building

ongoing_conflicts: Great Patriotic War vs Nazi Germany
